title: Power of Council to enforce attendance of persons, etc.

versions.text:
(1) For the purpose of inquiring into any matter, the Council shall have the same power as the Supreme Court has to issue directions or orders for securing the attendance of any person or the discovery or production of any document; and any such direction or order shall be enforceable as if it had been issued by the Supreme Court.

(2) The provisions of Article 204 shall apply to the Council as they apply to the Supreme Court and a High Court,

(1) For the purpose of inquiring into any matter, the Council shall have the same power as the the Federal Constitutional Court or the Supreme Court has to issue directions or orders for securing the attendance of any person or the discovery or production of any document; and any such direction or order shall be enforceable as if it had been issued by the the Federal Constitutional Court or the Supreme Court.

(2) The provisions of Article 204 shall apply to the Council as they apply to the Federal Constitutional Court, the Supreme Court and a High Court,
